skill.label: Machine Learning
skill.learningTopic: SupervisedLearning UnsupervisedLearning LogisticRegression DecisionTrees ModelEvaluation TrainTestSplit

skill.label: Deep Learning
skill.learningTopic: NeuralNetworks Backpropagation CNNs SequenceModels OverfittingRegularization TensorFlowBasics

skill.label: Natural Language Processing
skill.learningTopic: TextPreprocessing Tokenization WordEmbeddings TextClassification Transformers SemanticSearch

course.label: Machine Learning Foundations
course.coversTopic: SupervisedLearning UnsupervisedLearning LogisticRegression DecisionTrees ModelEvaluation TrainTestSplit

course.label: Deep Learning Foundations
course.coversTopic: NeuralNetworks Backpropagation CNNs SequenceModels TensorFlowBasics OverfittingRegularization

course.label: Natural Language Processing
course.coversTopic: TextPreprocessing Tokenization WordEmbeddings TextClassification Transformers SemanticSearch

topic.label: Python Notebooks
topic.description: Use notebook environments to load data, write Python code and document analysis steps.

topic.label: Data Cleaning
topic.description: Handle missing values, inconsistent formats, duplicated records and noisy datasets.

topic.label: Exploratory Data Analysis
topic.description: Explore distributions, correlations and early patterns before modelling.

topic.label: Descriptive Statistics
topic.description: Summarize datasets using mean, median, variance, percentiles and simple statistical measures.

topic.label: Visualization Design
topic.description: Choose charts and visual encodings that communicate insights clearly.

topic.label: Supervised Learning
topic.description: Train models using labelled data for classification and regression tasks.

topic.label: Unsupervised Learning
topic.description: Discover hidden patterns using clustering, dimensionality reduction and similarity analysis.

topic.label: Logistic Regression
topic.description: Build an interpretable classification model for binary or multi-class prediction.

topic.label: Decision Trees
topic.description: Learn rule-based models that split data into explainable decision paths.

topic.label: Model Evaluation
topic.description: Evaluate models using accuracy, precision, recall, F1 score and confusion matrices.

topic.label: Train/Test Split
topic.description: Separate training and testing data to estimate model performance on unseen cases.

topic.label: Neural Networks
topic.description: Understand layers, activations and weights used in deep learning models.

topic.label: Backpropagation
topic.description: Learn how neural networks update weights by propagating error gradients.

topic.label: Convolutional Neural Networks
topic.description: Use convolutional layers for image and spatial pattern recognition.

topic.label: Sequence Models
topic.description: Model ordered data such as text, time series and language sequences.

topic.label: TensorFlow Basics
topic.description: Build and train basic neural network models using TensorFlow tools.

topic.label: Overfitting and Regularization
topic.description: Reduce overfitting using dropout, regularization and validation strategies.

topic.label: REST API Design
topic.description: Design endpoints, resources, request methods and response formats for APIs.

topic.label: Git Workflow
topic.description: Use branching, commits and version control practices for team software development.

topic.label: Unit Testing
topic.description: Write tests that verify small units of program behaviour.

topic.label: Design Patterns
topic.description: Apply reusable software design solutions for common implementation problems.

topic.label: Requirements Analysis
topic.description: Translate user needs into clear functional and technical requirements.

topic.label: Semantic HTML
topic.description: Structure web pages with meaningful HTML elements.

topic.label: CSS Layout
topic.description: Build page layouts using box model, flexbox and grid.

topic.label: DOM Manipulation
topic.description: Use JavaScript to read, change and respond to page elements.

topic.label: Asynchronous JavaScript
topic.description: Work with promises, fetch requests and asynchronous browser behaviour.

topic.label: Responsive Design
topic.description: Design interfaces that adapt to mobile and desktop screen sizes.

topic.label: CIA Triad
topic.description: Understand confidentiality, integrity and availability as core security goals.

topic.label: Vulnerability Assessment
topic.description: Identify weaknesses in systems, applications and networks.

topic.label: Network Hardening
topic.description: Reduce attack surfaces using secure configuration and access control.

topic.label: Incident Response
topic.description: Prepare, detect, contain and recover from security incidents.

topic.label: Linux Security
topic.description: Use Linux permissions, users, logs and hardening practices.

topic.label: Relational Modeling
topic.description: Design tables, keys and relationships for structured data.

topic.label: Normalization
topic.description: Reduce redundancy and improve data integrity through normal forms.

topic.label: SQL Joins
topic.description: Combine records from multiple tables using join operations.

topic.label: Indexing and Transactions
topic.description: Improve query performance and maintain reliable database changes.

topic.label: Backup and Recovery
topic.description: Protect data using backup plans and restore procedures.

topic.label: Virtualization
topic.description: Run isolated compute environments on shared hardware.

topic.label: Cloud Compute and Storage
topic.description: Use cloud virtual machines, object storage and managed infrastructure services.

topic.label: IAM Basics
topic.description: Control cloud access using users, roles, policies and permissions.

topic.label: CI/CD Deployment
topic.description: Automate build, test and deployment workflows.

topic.label: Monitoring and Logging
topic.description: Observe system health and diagnose production issues.

topic.label: ETL Pipelines
topic.description: Extract, transform and load data for analytics workflows.

topic.label: KPI Modeling
topic.description: Define business metrics that measure performance and outcomes.

topic.label: Dashboard Design
topic.description: Design dashboards that support fast business decision making.

topic.label: Power BI Reporting
topic.description: Build interactive reports and visuals using Power BI concepts.

topic.label: Dimensional Modeling
topic.description: Organize facts and dimensions for business intelligence analysis.

topic.label: Text Preprocessing
topic.description: Clean and normalize text before language processing.

topic.label: Tokenization
topic.description: Split text into tokens for machine learning and NLP pipelines.

topic.label: Word Embeddings
topic.description: Represent words as vectors that capture semantic similarity.

topic.label: Text Classification
topic.description: Assign labels to text such as sentiment, topic or intent.

topic.label: Transformers
topic.description: Understand attention-based neural architectures used in modern NLP.

topic.label: Semantic Search
topic.description: Retrieve information using meaning and entity relationships rather than exact keywords only.

topic.label: Python Syntax
topic.description: Learn variables, expressions, control flow, loops and basic Python program structure.

topic.label: Python Data Structures
topic.description: Use lists, tuples, dictionaries, sets and common data manipulation patterns.

topic.label: Functions and Modules
topic.description: Organize reusable code using functions, imports, modules and packages.

topic.label: File Handling
topic.description: Read and write text, CSV, JSON and other local data files.

topic.label: Python Packages
topic.description: Install and use third-party packages with virtual environments and package managers.

topic.label: Probability Distributions
topic.description: Understand common distributions and how uncertainty is represented in data.

topic.label: Hypothesis Testing
topic.description: Use statistical tests, p-values and confidence intervals to evaluate assumptions.

topic.label: Regression Basics
topic.description: Model relationships between variables using simple and multiple regression ideas.

topic.label: Statistical Inference
topic.description: Draw conclusions from samples while accounting for uncertainty.

topic.label: SQL Select and Filtering
topic.description: Retrieve rows and columns using SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY and filtering logic.

topic.label: Aggregate Functions
topic.description: Summarize records using COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX and GROUP BY.

topic.label: Subqueries
topic.description: Use nested queries to solve multi-step database questions.

topic.label: Chart Selection
topic.description: Choose appropriate charts for comparison, trend, distribution, composition and relationship tasks.

topic.label: Data Storytelling
topic.description: Explain insights using context, visual hierarchy and narrative structure.

topic.label: Accessible Visualization
topic.description: Design charts with readable labels, contrast and inclusive color choices.

topic.label: Data Pipelines
topic.description: Move data through reliable collection, transformation and delivery steps.

topic.label: Data Warehousing
topic.description: Store integrated analytical data for reporting and decision support.

topic.label: Batch and Streaming Processing
topic.description: Compare scheduled batch workloads with near-real-time streaming data processing.

topic.label: Data Quality Checks
topic.description: Validate completeness, consistency, accuracy and freshness of data.

topic.label: Model Deployment
topic.description: Package and serve trained models for application or API use.

topic.label: Model Monitoring
topic.description: Track model quality, drift, latency and production behaviour over time.

topic.label: Model Versioning
topic.description: Manage model artifacts, datasets and experiment versions for reproducibility.

topic.label: Feature Stores
topic.description: Store and reuse machine learning features consistently between training and serving.

topic.label: Prompt Structure
topic.description: Write clear task instructions, context, constraints and output formats.

topic.label: Few-shot Prompting
topic.description: Guide model output by providing examples inside the prompt.

topic.label: Evaluation Rubrics
topic.description: Check AI output using criteria such as accuracy, completeness, safety and format compliance.

topic.label: Tool Use and Grounding
topic.description: Use external tools, retrieved context and evidence to ground model responses.

topic.label: Prompt Safety
topic.description: Reduce harmful, misleading or policy-violating model outputs with constraints and review.

topic.label: HTTP Methods
topic.description: Use GET, POST, PUT, PATCH and DELETE correctly in web APIs.

topic.label: Authentication and Authorization
topic.description: Verify identity and control access using tokens, sessions, roles and permissions.

topic.label: JSON Contracts
topic.description: Design predictable request and response schemas for API consumers.

topic.label: API Error Handling
topic.description: Return useful status codes, error bodies and recovery information.

topic.label: Forms and Accessibility
topic.description: Build usable forms with labels, validation, keyboard support and assistive technology support.

topic.label: Metadata and SEO
topic.description: Use document metadata, headings and semantic structure to improve discoverability.

topic.label: Accessibility Design
topic.description: Design interfaces that support keyboard navigation, readable contrast and inclusive interaction.

topic.label: Flexbox and Grid
topic.description: Build responsive two-dimensional layouts using modern CSS layout systems.

topic.label: CSS Selectors
topic.description: Target elements using selectors, specificity and cascade rules.

topic.label: Visual Styling
topic.description: Apply typography, spacing, colors and component styling consistently.

topic.label: JavaScript Functions
topic.description: Write functions, callbacks and reusable logic in JavaScript.

topic.label: Event Handling
topic.description: Respond to clicks, forms, keyboard input and browser events.

topic.label: Fetch API
topic.description: Request data from APIs and handle responses asynchronously.

topic.label: User Research
topic.description: Understand users through interviews, observation, surveys and behaviour analysis.

topic.label: Wireframing
topic.description: Sketch low-fidelity layouts to explore information structure and user flows.

topic.label: Usability Testing
topic.description: Test interfaces with users to find confusion, friction and task failure.

topic.label: Information Architecture
topic.description: Organize content and navigation so users can find information easily.

topic.label: Risk Management
topic.description: Identify, assess and reduce security and operational risks.

topic.label: Security Controls
topic.description: Apply preventive, detective and corrective controls to protect systems.

topic.label: OWASP Top 10
topic.description: Understand common web application security risks such as injection and broken access control.

topic.label: Firewalls and VPNs
topic.description: Control network traffic and secure remote access using network security tools.

topic.label: Intrusion Detection
topic.description: Detect suspicious traffic, events and attack patterns in systems or networks.

topic.label: Network Segmentation
topic.description: Separate systems into zones to limit access and reduce blast radius.

topic.label: Secure Protocols
topic.description: Use encrypted and authenticated protocols such as HTTPS, SSH and TLS.

topic.label: Threat Modeling
topic.description: Identify assets, adversaries, attack paths and mitigation strategies.

topic.label: Attack Vectors
topic.description: Understand common ways attackers enter, move through and exploit systems.

topic.label: Log Analysis
topic.description: Review logs to detect anomalies, incidents and operational problems.

topic.label: MITRE ATT&CK
topic.description: Use the ATT&CK knowledge base to reason about adversary tactics and techniques.

topic.label: Linux Command Line
topic.description: Navigate files, run commands and manage tasks from the shell.

topic.label: File Permissions
topic.description: Control access using users, groups, ownership and permission modes.

topic.label: Process Management
topic.description: Inspect, start, stop and monitor Linux processes and services.

topic.label: Shell Scripting
topic.description: Automate command-line tasks using shell scripts and environment variables.

topic.label: Problem Decomposition
topic.description: Break complex problems into smaller parts that can be solved and tested.

topic.label: Algorithmic Thinking
topic.description: Design step-by-step logic using conditions, loops, data structures and tradeoffs.

topic.label: Debugging
topic.description: Find and fix defects using observation, logging, reproduction and isolation.

topic.label: Root Cause Analysis
topic.description: Identify underlying causes rather than only treating symptoms.

topic.label: Trade-off Analysis
topic.description: Compare options across cost, complexity, risk, accuracy and maintainability.

topic.label: ER Diagrams
topic.description: Model entities, attributes and relationships using entity-relationship diagrams.

topic.label: Data Governance
topic.description: Manage ownership, quality, privacy and responsible use of data assets.

topic.label: Query Performance
topic.description: Analyze and improve slow database queries using indexes and execution plans.

topic.label: Access Control and Monitoring
topic.description: Protect database access and monitor activity for reliability and security.

topic.label: Replication and High Availability
topic.description: Keep databases resilient using replication, failover and recovery planning.

topic.label: Cloud Networking
topic.description: Design virtual networks, subnets, routing and secure service connectivity in cloud platforms.

topic.label: Serverless and Containers
topic.description: Deploy applications using managed functions, containers and orchestration concepts.

topic.label: Network Protocols
topic.description: Understand TCP/IP, UDP, HTTP, DNS and other communication protocols.

topic.label: IP Addressing
topic.description: Use IPv4, IPv6, subnetting and address planning for networks.

topic.label: Routing and Switching
topic.description: Move traffic between devices and networks using routing and switching concepts.

topic.label: DNS and HTTP
topic.description: Understand domain resolution and web request-response communication.

topic.label: Connectivity Troubleshooting
topic.description: Diagnose network failures using systematic checks and diagnostic tools.

topic.label: Infrastructure as Code
topic.description: Define infrastructure using versioned, repeatable configuration files.

topic.label: Containerization
topic.description: Package applications with dependencies using containers and image workflows.

topic.label: Business Metrics
topic.description: Define measurable indicators that connect analysis to business outcomes.

topic.label: Stakeholder Communication
topic.description: Translate technical findings into decisions, tradeoffs and recommendations.

topic.label: System Design
topic.description: Design software components, boundaries, data flows and service responsibilities.

topic.label: Scalability and Reliability
topic.description: Design systems that handle growth, failure and operational load.

topic.label: Architecture Documentation
topic.description: Document decisions, diagrams, constraints and system responsibilities clearly.

topic.label: API Integration
topic.description: Connect systems through APIs, data contracts and integration error handling.

topic.label: Syntax and Semantics
topic.description: Understand sentence structure and meaning in human language.

topic.label: Corpus Linguistics
topic.description: Analyze language patterns using large collections of real text.

topic.label: Phonetics and Morphology
topic.description: Study speech sounds and word formation patterns.

topic.label: Discourse and Pragmatics
topic.description: Analyze language use across context, conversation and intent.

topic.label: Privacy Principles
topic.description: Apply privacy-aware collection, storage, sharing and minimization practices.

topic.label: Bias and Fairness
topic.description: Identify and reduce unfair outcomes in data, models and decisions.

topic.label: Responsible AI
topic.description: Design AI systems with transparency, accountability, safety and human oversight.

topic.label: Consent and Compliance
topic.description: Respect consent, policy and regulatory requirements for data use.

career.title: Data Scientist
career.description: Analyzes data, builds predictive models and communicates insights for business or research decisions.

career.title: Machine Learning Engineer
career.description: Designs, trains and deploys machine learning systems for production applications.

career.title: AI Engineer
career.description: Builds intelligent applications using machine learning, deep learning, APIs and prompt engineering.

career.title: Web Developer
career.description: Creates interactive websites and web applications using front-end and API technologies.

career.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
career.description: Monitors systems, investigates threats and helps organizations reduce security risk.

career.title: Database Administrator
career.description: Maintains database platforms, query performance, backups and data reliability.

career.title: Cloud Engineer
career.description: Builds, operates and secures cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines and cloud services.

career.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
career.description: Builds dashboards, reports and analytical models that support organizational decisions.

career.title: Software Engineer
career.description: Designs and builds maintainable software systems, APIs and application features.

career.title: NLP Engineer
career.description: Builds language technology systems for text analysis, search, chatbots and information extraction.
